chunks.text: Technical Reports - Gerald Friedland. Enhancing GAN-based Vocoders with Contrastive Learning (EECS-2023-183) Haoming Guo, Gerald Friedland and Gopala Krishna Anumanchipalli. Multimodal Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Video Representation Learning (EECS-2022-206) Anup Hiremath.
chunks.question: What are two technical reports by Gerald Friedland?
chunks.answer: GAN-based Vocoders and Multimodal Contrastive Learning.

chunks.text: Learning Rate Estimation for Stochastic Gradient Descent (EECS-2022-155) Nadia Hyder and Gerald Friedland. Neurotoxin: Durable Backdoors in Federated Learning (EECS-2022-89) Linyue Song, Zhengming Zhang, Ashwinee Panda, Yaoqing Yang, Michael Mahoney, Joseph Gonzalez and Prateek Prateek Mittal.
chunks.question: What topics are covered in the 2022 technical reports?
chunks.answer: Learning rate estimation and federated learning backdoors.

chunks.text: On the Robustness of Learned Task Weights in Cross-modal Retrieval (EECS-2020-86) David Nahm.
chunks.question: What is the 2020 technical report about?
